heroDescription: Get to know Bitumpro’s expertise, technology, and commitment to advanced infrastructure materials.
ourBusinessDescription: Bitumpro is a Canadian infrastructure materials company focused on the development, production, and supply of advanced bituminous and petroleum-based solutions. Our flagship technology is Nano Polymer Modified Bitumen (Nano PMB), engineered to improve pavement durability, thermal stability, and resistance to freeze-thaw cycles.
ourVisionDescription: To become a leading North American manufacturer and supplier of nano-enhanced bituminous materials, setting new standards for pavement performance, infrastructure durability, and sustainable road construction.
corporateGovernanceDescription: We are committed to transparent operations, ethical business practices, responsible partnerships, and long-term value creation for customers, stakeholders, and infrastructure communities.
financialsDescription: Bitumpro is built on a scalable business model, lean operations, and a clear growth roadmap designed to support stable expansion across Canadian and international infrastructure markets.
historyDescription: Backed by more than 25 years of leadership experience in bitumen production, refining, product development, and international supply, Bitumpro is bringing advanced nano-enhanced bitumen technology to the Canadian infrastructure market.
aboutUsDescription: Bitumpro is a British Columbia-based manufacturing startup focused on Nano Polymer Modified Bitumen (Nano PMB), a high-performance asphalt binder designed to extend pavement life, improve resistance to harsh climate conditions, and reduce long-term maintenance costs. With more than 25 years of leadership experience in bitumen production, refining, product innovation, R&D, quality control, and international supply, Bitumpro combines technical knowledge, operational experience, and a focused go-to-market plan for Canadian infrastructure. Our roadmap begins with Nano PMB and expands toward Nano Bitumen Emulsions and Nano Asphalt Sealers as market demand grows.
readyToRestore: Ready to Build More Durable Infrastructure?
readyToRestoreDescription: Partner with Bitumpro for advanced bitumen technologies, reliable supply, and technical support tailored to your project.
